caption: A man and a woman sit side-by-side in an indoor auditorium setting. The man, wearing glasses, a light-colored suit jacket, a white shirt, and a brown tie, holds a microphone in his right hand and speaks, gesturing with his left hand. He moves his left arm dynamically, shifting from a closed position near his chest to a wide, open gesture extending outward. The woman sitting to his left wears glasses and a dark blazer over a dark top, with a white identification badge pinned to her lapel. She remains mostly still, looking forward with a neutral expression, her hands clasped in her lap over some white papers. Behind them, other attendees are partially visible, including one person wearing a striped garment. A silver railing runs horizontally across the foreground, partially obscuring the lower portion of the subjects.
